provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 course-list PDF publishes 23 courses with confirmed codes and titles under the Major Course List, but does not publish per-course credit points or a recommended year/semester study pattern. Credits and recommendedYear are therefore intentionally left unknown. A twenty-fourth row, Cross-Faculty Core Course Component III, still uses TBC as its course code and is intentionally omitted rather than assigned an invented code. The programme page confirms 121 cps for First Year Entry, 60 cps for Senior Year Entry, a 51-cp First Year Entry Major domain and a 6-cp Final Year Project domain, but those aggregates are not allocated to individual courses here and this supplement does not assert graduation completion.
